action: Launch Visual Studio Code by clicking the desktop icon or via the Start menu.
fallback_action: Perform a Google search using Internet Explorer

recipe.steps: is the first action. The task is to launch Visual Studio Code by clicking the desktop icon or via the Start menu. On the screen, I can see the Visual Studio Code icon (Box ID 381) on the left side of the desktop. I will double-click this icon to launch Visual Studio Code.
